item.title: From Soap Dish to Santa Claus
item.description: Nicola White explores Thames foreshore finds, tracing everyday objects from soap dish fragments to a Santa Claus piece and the stories they hold. AA mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: From Soap Dish to Santa Claus
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores Thames foreshore finds, tracing everyday objects from soap dish fragments to a Santa Claus piece and the stories they hold. AA mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Mudlarking Find: Military Pocket Watch
item.description: Nicola White explores a military pocket watch found on the Thames foreshore, sharing its history and the stories it may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Mudlarking Find: Military Pocket Watch
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a military pocket watch found on the Thames foreshore, sharing its history and the stories it may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Curious Wooden Artifact
item.description: Exploring a curious wooden artifact found while mudlarking on the Thames foreshore, where small objects reveal traces of everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Curious Wooden Artifact
media:content.media:description: Exploring a curious wooden artifact found while mudlarking on the Thames foreshore, where small objects reveal traces of everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Remarkable Thames Mudlarking Find
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares a thoughtful mudlarking discovery, revealing how small finds can connect us to everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Remarkable Thames Mudlarking Find
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares a thoughtful mudlarking discovery, revealing how small finds can connect us to everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Jewellery Finds Along the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares jewellery finds that reflect the river’s history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Jewellery Finds Along the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares jewellery finds that reflect the river’s history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Who Owned This Pirate-Inspired Pipe?
item.description: Exploring a pirate-inspired pipe on the Thames foreshore, Nicola White reflects on the clues small finds can reveal about past lives. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Who Owned This Pirate-Inspired Pipe?
media:content.media:description: Exploring a pirate-inspired pipe on the Thames foreshore, Nicola White reflects on the clues small finds can reveal about past lives. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Mudlarking a Deserted Foreshore
item.description: Exploring a quiet Thames foreshore for traces of the past and the stories they reveal. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Mudlarking a Deserted Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Exploring a quiet Thames foreshore for traces of the past and the stories they reveal. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Thames Find That Looked Like a Watch
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore after spotting an object that seemed like a vintage watch, showing how small finds can reveal history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Thames Find That Looked Like a Watch
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore after spotting an object that seemed like a vintage watch, showing how small finds can reveal history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Thames Mystery Object Revealed
item.description: Nicola White explores a mystery object found by the Thames and uncovers its story through careful research. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Thames Mystery Object Revealed
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a mystery object found by the Thames and uncovers its story through careful research. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A 19th-Century Pipe from the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a 19th-century pipe, showing how small finds can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A 19th-Century Pipe from the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a 19th-century pipe, showing how small finds can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Perfectly Preserved Vintage Bottle Found
item.description: Nicola White discovers a perfectly preserved vintage bottle on the Thames foreshore, exploring its history and the stories it may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Perfectly Preserved Vintage Bottle Found
media:content.media:description: Nicola White discovers a perfectly preserved vintage bottle on the Thames foreshore, exploring its history and the stories it may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Long Pipe Find on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares one of the longest pipes she has found, revealing how small objects can tell big stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares one of the longest pipes she has found, revealing how small objects can tell big stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority
